data.body: Update: /dso:fix-bug was successfully invoked in a subsequent session (after /reload-plugins). The skill resolved correctly and executed the full investigation+fix workflow on ticket c3f2-b72c, classifying it as llm-behavioral, dispatching dso:bot-psychologist, implementing the fix, passing review, and committing. This rules out a persistent skill resolution failure — the issue appears to be session-state-dependent (long session / prior context compactions) rather than a registration problem.
